summary: Iteration 59 — verified (a) ArchivePage crash fix, (b) new self-service /admin/my-profile UI, (c) backend removal of lecturer-mode & náslech endpoints, (d) UI removal of lecturer-mode toggle and NaslechPanel. Backend: 7/7 pytest in /app/backend/tests/test_my_profile_and_naslech_removal.py PASS (self-edit preferred_age_groups persisted via /api/auth/me, self-edit supported/learning program IDs, admin_note admin-only accepted, empty payload → 400, PATCH /team/{id}/lecturer-mode → 404/405, /bookings/{id}/naslech GET/POST → 404/405). Frontend: Logged in demo@budezivo.cz, seeded one archived program via POST /api/programs/{id}/archive; sidebar 'Můj profil' visible for admin (nav-my-profile data-testid OK); /admin/my-profile renders profile-title, profile-name-input, section-age-groups (5 age checkboxes age-ms_3_6, age-zs1_7_12, age-zs2_12_16, age-ss_15_19, age-adults), section-supported, section-learning, and profile-save-button; toggling an age checkbox + saving shows 'Profil uložen' sonner toast and PATCH /api/team/{uid}/lecturer-profile returns 200. Navigated Programy → Archiv button (data-testid=archive-link-btn) → /admin/archive loaded with archive-title; clicking Report button on the archived 'Seznamte se!' program opened the dialog rendering archive-report content: Program section (Název/Věková skupina/Kapacita/Cena/Důvod archivace), Statistiky section (8 numeric tiles rendered as '0') and 'Exportovat report (JSON)' button — NO CRASH, NO console errors (previous TypeError on reportData.program.name gone, null-safe render works). /admin/team: 0 [data-testid^='lecturer-mode-toggle-'] elements. /admin/bookings: 0 [data-testid='naslech-card'] elements. No pageerror, no console errors across all pages.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/ArchivePage.js line 51 calls GET /api/programs/{id}/archive-report with params {format:'json'} — response handled at line 153 with null-safe guard `reportData && reportData.program` preventing the previous TypeError.

VERIFIED: /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/MyProfilePage.js implements mutual-exclusion between supportedIds and learningIds via toggleSupported/toggleLearning (lines 70-85) — clicking a program in one list removes it from the other in local state before save.

VERIFIED: /app/frontend/src/components/layout/AdminLayout.js line 89 registers nav-my-profile with roles=['admin','spravce','edukator','lektor','pokladni','staff','viewer'] → visible for all requested roles.

VERIFIED: /app/frontend/src/App.js line 174 route is '/admin/archive' (not '/admin/programs/archive' as stated in PRD description). The Programy page 'Archiv' button uses the correct path, so the flow is unaffected, but PRD description should note '/admin/archive'.

VERIFIED: Backend /api/bookings/{id}/naslech endpoints and /api/team/{id}/lecturer-mode return 404/405 (observers router fully removed). Existing /api/team/{id}/lecturer-profile accepts partial updates, rejects empty payload with 400, and is admin-scoped for admin_note.

MINOR: /admin/my-profile — when user object from /api/team is missing (e.g., user not returned by /team because role is not whitelisted there), MyProfilePage falls back silently to user?.name / empty arrays. PATCH still works since it uses user.id. Consider loading via a dedicated /api/team/me endpoint for consistency.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (archive report dialog, my-profile CRUD, removals all confirmed)

test_credentials: demo@budezivo.cz / Demo2026! used throughout. No lecturer-role test user was created — impersonation/lecturer 403 path is already covered by iteration 58 test suite.
seed_data_creation: Archived 1 program (id=arch-enhance-v59, 'Seznamte se!') via POST /api/programs/{id}/archive with reason 'Test archive iter59' to populate the archive page. Can be restored via POST /api/programs/{id}/unarchive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real archive route is /admin/archive (not /admin/programs/archive) — use sidebar: Programy → 'Archiv' button (data-testid=archive-link-btn) or direct goto /admin/archive. Direct goto /admin/programs/archive redirects to landing. Seeded archive program 'Seznamte se!' is still archived; unarchive if a clean state is needed. Run pytest with: `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_my_profile_and_naslech_removal.py -v`.
rca of the issue: Original crash cause: ArchivePage previously called /api/programs/{id}/archive-report without format param, receiving a PDF binary that was accessed as JSON (reportData.program.name threw TypeError). Fix applied at ArchivePage.js:51 (axios.get ... params: {format: 'json'}) + null-safe render at line 153 (`reportData && reportData.program ?`). Verified: dialog now opens reliably with JSON data and no TypeError.
